name: General Partnership Agreement
description: A foundational agreement for two or more individuals or entities joining together in a business venture for profit.
content:
GENERAL PARTNERSHIP AGREEMENT

This General Partnership Agreement (the "Agreement") is made and entered into on {{formatDate agreement_date}} by and among the undersigned Partners, for the purpose of forming a general partnership (the "Partnership") in accordance with the laws of {{jurisdiction}}.

1. THE PARTNERS

The parties to this Agreement (the "Partners") are:

{{#each partners}}

Partner:
Name/Entity: {{this.partner_name}}
ID/Tax No: {{this.tax_id}}
Address: {{this.address}}

{{/each}}

2. PARTNERSHIP NAME AND PURPOSE

Name of Partnership: The business of the Partnership shall be conducted under the name {{partnership_name}}.

Business Purpose: The primary purpose of the Partnership is to engage in the business of:

{{business_purpose}}

3. CAPITAL CONTRIBUTIONS

The initial capital of the Partnership shall be contributed by the Partners as follows:

{{capital_contributions}}

No Partner shall be obligated to make any additional capital contributions unless unanimously agreed upon by all Partners.

4. PROFIT AND LOSS DISTRIBUTION

The net profits and losses of the Partnership shall be divided among the Partners in the following proportions/manner:

{{profit_loss_distribution}}

5. MANAGEMENT AND VOTING RIGHTS

Management of the Partnership: {{management_structure}}

Unless otherwise stated, all major decisions affecting the Partnership (such as taking on debt, admitting new partners, or selling major assets) require the unanimous consent of all Partners.

6. TERM OF PARTNERSHIP

The Partnership shall commence on {{formatDate agreement_date}} and shall continue {{term_of_partnership}}.

7. DISSOLUTION AND WITHDRAWAL

The Partnership shall be dissolved upon the occurrence of any of the following events: (a) unanimous written consent of all Partners; (b) the bankruptcy, death, or withdrawal of a Partner (unless the remaining Partners agree to continue); or (c) as otherwise required by law.

Additional Dissolution Terms:

{{dissolution_terms}}

8. GOVERNING LAW

This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of {{jurisdiction}}.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Partners have duly executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.

Signatures of Partners:

{{#each partners}}

{{this.partner_name}}


Signature: _________________________


{{/each}}

fields.name: business_purpose
fields.label: Business Purpose
fields.placeholder: Describe what the partnership will do.

fields.name: capital_contributions
fields.label: Capital Contributions
fields.placeholder: Partner A: $10k, Partner B: Equipment valued at $5k

fields.name: profit_loss_distribution
fields.label: Profit & Loss Distribution
fields.placeholder: e.g., Split equally 50/50, or proportional to capital

fields.name: management_structure
fields.label: Management & Voting Structure
fields.placeholder: e.g., All partners have equal voting rights. Partner A handles day-to-day operations.

fields.name: term_of_partnership
fields.label: Term of Partnership
fields.placeholder: e.g., Indefinitely, For 5 Years, Until project completion

fields.name: dissolution_terms
fields.label: Dissolution / Withdrawal Terms
fields.placeholder: What happens if someone wants to leave? Buyout options?

fields.name: jurisdiction
fields.label: Governing Law / Jurisdiction
fields.placeholder: e.g., State of California, UK Law
